<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/drawerLayout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fitsSystemWindows="true">
<androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout android:id="@+id/homeContentRoot" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivHomeBanner" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:contentDescription="@null" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:src="@drawable/photo_banner" tools:ignore="ContentDescription" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<View android:id="@+id/viewHomeBannerDimmer" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_home_dark_gradient" android:alpha="0.8" android:visibility="gone" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" />
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/topBar" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_top_bar_margin_top" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_top_bar_padding_horizontal" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMenu" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_top_action_size" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_top_action_size" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:padding="0dp" android:gravity="center" app:backgroundTint="@color/home_top_action_bg" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_top_action_corner_radius" app:icon="@drawable/ic_menu_24" app:iconGravity="textTop" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="@dimen/home_top_action_icon_size" app:iconTint="@color/white" />
<View android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/titleContainer" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/topBar" app:layout_constraintBottom_toTopOf="@+id/mainContent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.12">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHomeOur" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_title_our" android:textColor="@color/history_pill_pink" android:textSize="@dimen/home_title_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:letterSpacing="@dimen/home_title_letter_spacing" android:shadowColor="@color/screen_title_shadow" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="0" android:shadowRadius="@dimen/home_title_shadow_radius" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHomeMemories" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_memories_margin_top" android:text="@string/home_title_memories" android:textColor="@color/history_pill_pink" android:textSize="@dimen/home_title_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:letterSpacing="@dimen/home_title_letter_spacing" android:shadowColor="@color/screen_title_shadow" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="0" android:shadowRadius="@dimen/home_title_shadow_radius" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHomePhotobooth" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_photobooth_margin_top" android:text="@string/home_title_photobooth" android:textColor="@color/camera_mode_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/home_subtitle_text_size" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:includeFontPadding="false" />
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/mainContent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:maxWidth="@dimen/home_content_max_width" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" app:layout_constraintVertical_bias="0.86">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnStart" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_main_button_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_main_button_height" android:text="@string/btn_start_decorated" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/home_main_start_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@color/history_pill_pink" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_main_button_corner_radius" app:elevation="@dimen/home_main_start_elevation" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnGallery" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_main_button_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_main_button_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_main_button_spacing" android:text="@string/btn_gallery" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/home_main_gallery_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:backgroundTint="@color/home_gallery_button_bg" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_main_button_corner_radius" app:elevation="@dimen/home_main_gallery_elevation" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnAdmin" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_admin_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_admin_top_margin" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:text="@string/admin_go_to_dashboard" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="@dimen/home_admin_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" app:icon="@drawable/ic_settings_24" app:iconTint="@color/white" app:backgroundTint="@color/home_admin_chip_bg" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_admin_corner_radius" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/drawerPanel" android:layout_width="@dimen/admin_nav_drawer_width" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_gravity="start" android:background="@color/home_drawer_bg" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_padding_horizontal" android:paddingTop="@dimen/home_drawer_padding_top" android:paddingBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_padding_bottom">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerOur" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/home_drawer_our" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_title_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMemories" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_subtitle_top_margin" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/home_drawer_memories" android:textAllCaps="true" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_title_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_divider_top_margin" android:background="@color/home_drawer_divider" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerShowHistory" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_item_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_item_top_margin" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_grid_view_24" android:drawablePadding="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:drawableTint="@color/home_drawer_text" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/home_drawer_show_history" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_item_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerChangeBanner" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_item_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_item_secondary_top_margin" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_image_24" android:drawablePadding="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:drawableTint="@color/home_drawer_text" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/home_drawer_change_banner" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_item_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerAdminDashboard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_item_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_item_secondary_top_margin" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_settings_24" android:drawablePadding="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:drawableTint="@color/home_drawer_text" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/admin_go_to_dashboard" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_item_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_section_top_margin" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMusicLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_music" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_label_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupMusicState" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_height" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_on" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOff" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_off" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_music_language_gap" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerLanguageLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_language" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_label_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLanguageToggle" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:padding="0dp" android:gravity="center" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="16dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_flag_vn" app:iconGravity="textTop" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="32dp" app:iconTint="@null" /> </FrameLayout> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_music_language_gap" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerThemeLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_theme" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_label_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupTheme" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_height" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnThemeLight" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_theme_light" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnThemeDark" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_theme_dark" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnThemeSystem" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1.2" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_theme_system" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_bottom_divider_margin_bottom" android:background="@color/home_drawer_divider" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDrawerSignOut" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_height" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_margin_top" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_margin_bottom" android:text="@string/auth_sign_out" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@color/history_pill_pink" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_corner_radius" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

<com.example.expressionphotobooth.ui.OutlinedTextView android:id="@+id/tvHomeMemories" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_memories_margin_top" android:text="@string/home_title_memories" android:textColor="@color/home_neon_title" android:textSize="@dimen/home_title_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-black" android:includeFontPadding="false" android:letterSpacing="@dimen/home_title_letter_spacing" android:textScaleX="0.93" android:shadowColor="@android:color/transparent" android:shadowDx="0" android:shadowDy="0" android:shadowRadius="0" app:strokeColor="@color/white" app:strokeWidth="@dimen/home_title_stroke_width" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvHomePhotobooth" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_photobooth_margin_top" android:text="@string/home_title_photobooth" android:textColor="@color/home_brand_wordmark" android:textSize="@dimen/home_subtitle_text_size" android:fontFamily="@font/pacifico_regular" android:includeFontPadding="false" />

<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_divider_top_margin" android:background="@color/home_drawer_divider" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerShowHistory" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_item_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_item_top_margin" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_grid_view_24" android:drawablePadding="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:drawableTint="@color/home_drawer_text" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/home_drawer_show_history" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_item_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerChangeBanner" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_item_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_item_secondary_top_margin" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_image_24" android:drawablePadding="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:drawableTint="@color/home_drawer_text" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/home_drawer_change_banner" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_item_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerAdminDashboard" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_item_height" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_item_secondary_top_margin" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_item_clickable" android:drawableStart="@drawable/ic_settings_24" android:drawablePadding="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:drawableTint="@color/home_drawer_text" android:fontFamily="serif" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="@dimen/home_drawer_item_padding_horizontal" android:text="@string/admin_go_to_dashboard" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_item_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_section_top_margin" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerMusicLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_music" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_label_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupMusicState" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_height" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOn" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_on" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnMusicOff" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_music_off" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_music_language_gap" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerLanguageLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_language" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_label_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<FrameLayout android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLanguageToggle" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:insetLeft="0dp" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetRight="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:padding="0dp" android:gravity="center" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="16dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_flag_vn" app:iconGravity="textTop" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="32dp" app:iconTint="@null" /> </FrameLayout> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_music_language_gap" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvDrawerThemeLabel" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:fontFamily="serif" android:text="@string/home_drawer_theme" android:textColor="@color/home_drawer_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_label_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/groupTheme" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_height" android:background="@drawable/bg_drawer_spinner" app:selectionRequired="true" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnThemeLight" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_theme_light" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnThemeDark" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_theme_dark" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnThemeSystem" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_weight="1.2" android:insetTop="0dp" android:insetBottom="0dp" android:minWidth="0dp" android:minHeight="0dp" android:text="@string/home_theme_system" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/home_toggle_text" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_lang_toggle_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@android:color/transparent" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_toggle_corner_radius" app:rippleColor="@color/home_toggle_ripple" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_bottom_divider_margin_bottom" android:background="@color/home_drawer_divider" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnDrawerSignOut" android:layout_width="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_width" android:layout_height="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_height" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginTop="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_margin_top" android:layout_marginBottom="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_margin_bottom" android:text="@string/auth_sign_out" android:textAllCaps="false" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textSize="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_text_size" android:textStyle="bold" app:backgroundTint="@color/history_pill_pink" app:cornerRadius="@dimen/home_drawer_sign_out_corner_radius" />
</LinearLayout>
</androidx.drawerlayout.widget.DrawerLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Night palette overrides for Home + Drawer theme switching --> <color name="launcher_splash_bg">#121522</color> <color name="home_top_action_bg">#4A5F9E</color> <color name="home_drawer_bg">#0E1B3E</color> <color name="home_drawer_text">#FFD1E8</color> <color name="home_drawer_divider">#66FFFFFF</color> <color name="home_gallery_button_bg">#4F9F79</color> <color name="home_admin_chip_bg">#5A6EA8</color> <color name="home_toggle_text">#1E2C5E</color> <color name="home_toggle_ripple">#33FFD1E8</color> <color name="history_pill_pink">#F5A9D0</color>
<color name="admin_dashboard_bg">#101C42</color> <color name="app_bg_light">#111827</color> <color name="app_blue">#9BB7FF</color> <color name="admin_subtitle_color">#BFD0F0</color> <color name="admin_card_stroke">#33466F</color> <color name="primary_alpha_10">#2B9BB7FF</color> <color name="pink_alpha_12">#2BF5A9D0</color>
<!-- Brand selected state remains stable in dark --> <color name="home_toggle_selected_bg">@color/camera_mode_primary</color> <color name="home_toggle_selected_text">@color/white</color>
<!-- Semantic tokens for full-app dark palette --> <color name="screen_bg">#090C1A</color> <color name="screen_surface">#B312223F</color> <color name="screen_surface_alt">#162341</color> <color name="screen_title">#F8FAFC</color> <color name="screen_title_shadow">#B3F5A9D0</color> <color name="screen_subtitle">#C8D4F2</color> <color name="screen_icon_tint">#D9E4FF</color> <color name="screen_divider">#3A4E79</color> <color name="screen_overlay">#CC000000</color> <color name="screen_text_muted">#AFC0DE</color>
<color name="history_screen_bg">#0F172A</color> <color name="history_primary_text">#D7E3FF</color> <color name="history_card_surface">#223252</color> <color name="history_card_stroke">#4A608F</color> <color name="history_danger">#FF7474</color>
<!-- Dark mode text tokens --> <color name="surface_card">#1E293B</color> <color name="text_primary">#F8FAFC</color> <color name="text_secondary">#AFC0DE</color> <color name="text_disabled">#6A7D9A</color>
<!-- Gallery readability tuning --> <color name="gallery_overlay_scrim">#54000000</color>
<!-- Desaturated but readable brand accents for dark --> <color name="camera_mode_primary">#7EA2E8</color> <color name="app_pink">#FF80AB</color> <color name="edit_accent">#6E94D0</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <declare-styleable name="OutlinedTextView"> <attr name="strokeColor" format="color" /> <attr name="strokeWidth" format="dimension" /> </declare-styleable> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="launcher_splash_bg">#FFF8F2FF</color> <color name="launcher_icon_bg">#FF8A6DDE</color>
<!-- Edit UI --> <color name="edit_accent">#2A5298</color> <color name="edit_label">#88000000</color>
<!-- None / default --> <color name="thumb_none">#DCDFE6</color>
<!-- Presets --> <color name="thumb_preset_cute">#F9C4D4</color> <color name="thumb_preset_kpop">#A8C4F0</color> <color name="thumb_preset_classic">#C8B89A</color> <color name="thumb_preset_retro">#D4A373</color> <color name="thumb_preset_cinematic">#2A3B4C</color>
<!-- Filters --> <color name="thumb_filter_soft">#EDD5C8</color> <color name="thumb_filter_bw">#7A7A7A</color> <color name="thumb_filter_vintage">#EDC68A</color> <color name="thumb_filter_cool">#8AABED</color> <color name="thumb_filter_warm">#ECAE7E</color> <color name="thumb_filter_sepia">#B89973</color>
<!-- Frames --> <color name="thumb_frame_cortis">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="thumb_frame_t1">#1A3A7A</color> <color name="thumb_frame_aespa">#D070A0</color>
<!-- Stickers --> <color name="thumb_sticker_star">#FFF0A0</color> <color name="thumb_sticker_flash">#FFE066</color> <color name="thumb_sticker_camera">#C8DCF4</color> <color name="thumb_pink">#ff99be</color> <color name="thumb_gold">#FFC107</color> <color name="thumb_yellow">#FFEB3B</color> <color name="thumb_blue_grey">#607D8B</color>
<!-- Auth / Input --> <color name="color_input_stroke">#E0E8F4</color>
<!-- Dashboard Colors --> <color name="admin_dashboard_bg">#1B2A5C</color> <color name="camera_mode_primary">#37579D</color> <color name="app_bg_light">#F0F3FA</color> <color name="app_blue">#3D68E8</color> <color name="app_pink">#FF4081</color> <color name="admin_subtitle_color">#8A9BB8</color> <color name="admin_card_stroke">#E4EAF6</color> <color name="primary_alpha_10">#1A3D68E8</color> <color name="pink_alpha_12">#1EFF4081</color> <color name="flash_active">#FFD600</color>
<!-- Home / Drawer --> <color name="home_top_action_bg">#3B4D82</color> <color name="home_drawer_bg">#042B66</color> <color name="home_drawer_text">#F7A9D5</color> <color name="home_drawer_divider">#CCFFFFFF</color> <color name="home_gallery_button_bg">#81C19B</color> <color name="home_admin_chip_bg">#40FFFFFF</color> <color name="home_toggle_text">#1B2559</color> <color name="home_toggle_ripple">#22F7A9D5</color> <color name="home_toggle_selected_bg">@color/camera_mode_primary</color> <color name="home_toggle_selected_text">@color/white</color>
<!-- Semantic tokens for multi-screen theming --> <color name="screen_bg">@color/app_bg_light</color> <color name="screen_surface">#FAFCFF</color> <color name="screen_surface_alt">#F8FAFD</color> <color name="screen_title">@color/camera_mode_primary</color> <color name="screen_title_shadow">@color/white</color> <color name="screen_subtitle">@color/app_blue</color> <color name="screen_icon_tint">@color/camera_mode_primary</color> <color name="screen_divider">@color/admin_card_stroke</color> <color name="screen_overlay">#88000000</color> <color name="screen_text_muted">#5D6B8A</color>
<!-- History UI --> <color name="history_screen_bg">#F7F9FF</color> <color name="history_primary_text">#2A4EA1</color> <color name="history_pill_pink">#F7A9D5</color> <color name="history_danger">#FF3D3D</color> <color name="history_card_surface">#73FFFFFF</color> <color name="history_card_stroke">#443A57C4</color> <color name="black_overlay_80">#CC000000</color> <color name="black_overlay_60">#99000000</color>
<!-- New Dark Mode & Token Fixes --> <color name="surface_card">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="text_primary">#0F172A</color> <color name="text_secondary">#475569</color> <color name="text_disabled">#94A3B8</color>
<!-- Gallery readability tuning --> <color name="gallery_overlay_scrim">#66000000</color> </resources>
